artifact.name: RUN-009_deep_research_narrative.json
artifact.purpose: Deep research narrative: threat model, failure modes, mitigations, verification plan; derived from RUN-006 evidence manifest.

policy_decision.requested_action: Generate and persist a defensive threat-model narrative artifact for audit/readiness; no external actions.
policy_decision.user_safety_rationale: Defensive analysis only; no exploit steps, payloads, or attacker URLs; focuses on mitigation and verification.

integrity_notes: Artifact bytes must be validated via sha256 prior to sealing.
Citations are source IDs referencing RUN-006 source_catalog, not external browsing.
